name: docxy_list
description: List the docxy editors currently running on this machine (instance/pane id, port, pid).

name: docxy_new
description: Create a new blank .docx at a path and open it in the running docxy (in a VS Code window, a new tab). With no docxy running the file is still created. Refuses to overwrite an existing file.

path.description: File path for the new document (created; must not exist).

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_status
description: Report the open document's path, format, modified flag, and block count.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_outline
description: Return the document's heading outline: each heading's block index, level, and text.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_read
description: Read the live document (including unsaved edits). Returns per-block text + kind; defaults to the whole document, or pass a block range.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_find
description: Find all occurrences of a query in the live document; returns match positions and the containing paragraph.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_replace_range
description: Replace paragraphs [start..=end] with new text (\n separates paragraphs). Undoable; endpoints must be paragraphs.

start.description: First paragraph block index to replace.

end.description: Last paragraph block index, inclusive (default: start).

text.description: Replacement text; \n starts a new paragraph.

markdown.description: Parse text as Markdown (headings, bold, lists, tables, links) instead of plain text.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_insert
description: Insert text as new paragraph(s) before the block at `at` (\n separates paragraphs). Undoable.

at.description: Block index to insert before (== block count to append).

text.description: Text to insert; \n starts a new paragraph.

markdown.description: Parse text as Markdown (headings, bold, lists, tables, links) instead of plain text.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_append
description: Append text as new paragraph(s) at the end of the document (\n separates paragraphs). Undoable.

text.description: Text to append; \n starts a new paragraph.

markdown.description: Parse text as Markdown (headings, bold, lists, tables, links) instead of plain text.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_save
description: Save the open document to its file.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_export
description: Export the live document (including unsaved edits) as Markdown or plain text.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_export_pdf
description: Render the live document to a PDF at a path. Refuses to overwrite an existing file.

path.description: File path for the PDF (created; must not exist).

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_comments
description: List the document's review comments (author, initials, date, text, anchor), in anchor order.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_notes
description: List the document's footnotes and endnotes, in file order.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_header
description: Read the default section header's block content (empty if the document has none).

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_footer
description: Read the default section footer's block content (empty if the document has none).

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_metadata
description: Read the document's core properties (title, author, subject, keywords, comments, last saved by, revision, created, modified) — present-if-set.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_stats
description: Word/character/paragraph/block counts over the live document.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_replace_all
description: Replace every occurrence of a query with text across the whole document (case-insensitive unless case_sensitive:true). Undoable.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_undo
description: Undo the last edit, if any. Returns {done:false} when there is nothing to undo.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_redo
description: Redo the last undone edit, if any. Returns {done:false} when there is nothing to redo.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_format
description: Apply character formatting to every run in a block range — bold/italic/underline/strike are set directly (not toggled), plus color/highlight/font/size. One undo checkpoint.

highlight.description: Highlight color: one of yellow, green, cyan, magenta, red, blue, lightGray, darkYellow, or "none" to clear.

patch.description: Formatting to apply — at least one key required; an unknown key errors naming it. Keys absent from the patch leave that aspect of each run's existing formatting untouched.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: docxy_set_style
description: Set a paragraph style and/or alignment over a block range. At least one of `style`/`align` is required. One undo checkpoint.

style.description: Paragraph style id: Heading1, Heading2, Heading3, Heading4, Heading5, Heading6, Quote, SourceCode, or "Normal" to clear to the default style.

target.description: Optional: which docxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_list
description: List the xlsxy editors currently running on this machine (instance/pane id, port, pid).

name: xlsxy_new
description: Create a new blank .xlsx at a path and open it in the running xlsxy (in a VS Code window, a new tab). With no xlsxy running the file is still created. Refuses to overwrite an existing file.

path.description: File path for the new workbook (created; must not exist).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_status
description: Report the open workbook's path, modified flag, sheet count, and active sheet.

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_sheets
description: List every sheet: index, name, and used size (rows/cols).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_read
description: Read non-empty cells of the live workbook (including unsaved edits): value, formula, and display text per cell. Defaults to the active sheet's whole used range, or pass an A1-style range.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_get
description: Read one cell: value, formula, and display text.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_set
description: Set a cell. A leading '=' makes a formula (validated + recalculated); otherwise number/bool/text is inferred like typing into the grid. Undoable.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_clear
description: Clear a range's values/formulas (styles kept). One undo group.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_find
description: Search cell values and formula text (case-insensitive) across all sheets, or one sheet.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_recalc
description: Recalculate the whole workbook (and refresh pivots).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_save
description: Save the open workbook to its file.

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_comments
description: List every cell comment (threads flattened in reply order): sheet, cell ref, author, text.

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_comment_add
description: Add a threaded comment to a cell (or a reply, if the cell already has a thread).

author.description: Comment author (defaults to the editing identity).

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_comment_remove
description: Remove the comment (threaded or legacy note) on a cell, if any.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_range_set
description: Write a rectangular block of cells starting at a top-left ref, atomically: every formula in the batch is validated before anything is applied. One undo group.

rows.description: Rows of cell text, each row an array of strings entered like xlsxy_set's text (empty string clears the cell).

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_export_csv
description: Export a sheet's cells as display-formatted, RFC-4180 CSV.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_import_csv
description: Import CSV text as a brand-new sheet (never overwrites an existing one; name collisions are deduplicated).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_pivot
description: Compute an ad-hoc pivot table over a range (first row = header names); read-only, no workbook mutation.

range.description: A1-style range, e.g. "A1:D100", first row = headers.

rows.description: Header names to group by, as pivot rows.

cols.description: Header names to group by, as pivot columns.

col.description: Header name of the column to aggregate.

agg.description: Aggregation: sum, count, countNums, average, max, min, product, stdDev, stdDevP, var, or varP.

values.description: Measures to compute, each a {col, agg} pair.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_replace_all
description: Literal find/replace across every cell's input text, on every sheet. One undo group.

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_sheet_add
description: Add a new sheet (deduplicated name on collision — never errors on a taken name).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_sheet_remove
description: Remove a sheet (errors on the last one — a workbook must keep at least one).

sheet.description: Sheet index or name to remove.

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_sheet_rename
description: Rename a sheet and rewrite every formula/defined-name reference to it.

sheet.description: Sheet index or name to rename.

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_row_insert
description: Insert rows at a 0-based row index.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_row_delete
description: Delete rows at a 0-based row index.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_col_insert
description: Insert columns at a 0-based column index.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_col_delete
description: Delete columns at a 0-based column index.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_eval
description: Side-effect-free formula preview: evaluate a formula against the live workbook at a cell without writing anywhere.

ref.description: Cell to evaluate at, e.g. "B4" (default A1).

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_stats
description: Summary statistics (sum, count, countNums, average, min, max) over a range.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_charts
description: List every chart in the workbook: kind, title, categories, and series.

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_pivots
description: List every persistent pivot table: sheet, row/column fields, and value fields.

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_format
description: Apply cell formatting (number format, bold/italic, font/fill color, alignment) to every cell in a range. One undo group. `xlsxy_get`'s reply echoes a cell's current format the same way, for read-modify-write.

patch.description: Formatting to apply — at least one key required; an unknown key errors naming it. Keys absent from the patch leave that aspect of each cell's existing style untouched.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_col_width
description: Set one column's display width, in Excel column-width units.

col.description: Column letter (e.g. "C") or 0-based index; the reply echoes the numeric index.

width.description: New column width; must be positive.

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.

name: xlsxy_pivot_create
description: Create a REAL, persistent pivot table on a new sheet (first row of `range` = header names) — unlike `xlsxy_pivot`, this mutates the workbook: the pivot participates in `xlsxy_pivots` and its output is refreshed by `xlsxy_recalc`. Clears undo history like adding a sheet (an agent-level undo must remove both the created sheet and the pivot registration).

range.description: A1-style range, e.g. "A1:D100", first row = headers.

rows.description: Header names to group by, as pivot rows.

cols.description: Header names to group by, as pivot columns.

col.description: Header name of the column to aggregate.

agg.description: Aggregation: sum, count, countNums, average, max, min, product, stdDev, stdDevP, var, or varP.

values.description: Measures to compute, each a {col, agg} pair.

name.description: Destination sheet name for the pivot output (default: PivotN).

sheet.description: Optional sheet index or name (default: the active sheet).

target.description: Optional: which xlsxy to act on (a substring of its instance/pane id) when several are open.
